🧜‍♂️ ★ | I walk a lonely road, the only road that I have ever known.
----
**Mermay - Final Day**

OWAH!!! THANK YOU SO MUCH EVERYONE!! <3 Mermay was quite eventful this year! So SO many amazing creators participated! I will not stop posting merfolk, NEVER!!! I am simply taking a little step back since... hella burnt tf out. If you are interested in any of my merfolk, here's a complete, comprehensive list of ALL of my merfolk bots. *hopefully* I didn't miss one, lol.
